title: Impact of COVID-19 on the Indian Economy and Auto Industry

summary.about: The pandemic’s early economic and operational effects on India, especially its automobile industry.
summary.audience: Automotive leaders, economic policymakers and recovery planners.
summary.method: Combines early public-health, macroeconomic, oil-price, policy and industry evidence in a scenario-based commentary.
summary.insights: Lockdowns deepen an existing auto slowdown, but fiscal support, low oil prices and timely policy action can improve recovery prospects.
